nasb.text: Ehud came to him while he was sitting alone in his cool roof chamber. And Ehud said, “I have a message from God for you.” And he arose from his seat.

esv.text: And Ehud came to him as he was sitting alone in his cool roof chamber. And Ehud said, “I have a message from God for you.” And he arose from his seat.

cnv.text: 以笏來到王那裡；王獨自一人坐在涼樓上。以笏說：“我有　神的話要告訴你。”王就從座位上站起來。

ccb.text: 当时王独自坐在楼上的房间乘凉，以笏近前说：“我有从上帝而来的讯息要禀告。”王站起来的时候，
